## IWorkspace.lock() method

Locks the workspace. - Locks the key store, clearing secrets from memory

**Signature:**


**Returns:**

Result&lt;[IWorkspace](./ts-chocolate.iworkspace.md)<!-- -->&gt;
